testCases.title: Cart Merge - Anonymous Then Register
testCases.notes: Registration requires email verification which cannot be auto-completed in MCP browser session. The storefront shows 'verify your email' prompt after registration and does not auto-login. Manual email verification step is not automatable via MCP agent.

testCases.title: Cart Merge - Currency Mismatch
testCases.failedAssertion: [DOM] prices displayed in customer default currency (EUR)
testCases.notes: EUR_USER_EMAIL (larch9900.mango@mail.com) signed in successfully but currency header remained USD after merge. Prices displayed in USD ($124.00) instead of EUR. The currency context for EUR user account was not applied after guest-to-user cart merge. All products remained at USD pricing. BL-CART-004 violated: cart currency did not switch to user account default currency on sign-in.

testCases.title: Cart Merge - Persists After Logout and Re-login
Cart Merge - Smart Merge Failure Handling
Cart Merge Selection - Empty Cart + Selected All (ON)
Cart Merge Selection - Both Selected All (ON)
Cart Merge Selection - Both Unselected All (ON)
testCases.notes: Store setting ON; both user and guest items were manually unselected pre-merge. After merge all items preserved unselected state. ON setting applies to newly-added items only, does not override pre-existing explicit unselected state.

testCases.title: Cart Merge Selection - Selected + Unselected (ON)
testCases.notes: User cart items retained selected state; guest cart items retained unselected state after merge. Header checkbox showed indeterminate [checked=mixed]. Mixed selection state handled correctly.

testCases.title: Cart Merge Selection - Mixed + Mixed (ON)
testCases.notes: Both user and guest carts had mixed selected/unselected states. After merge, per-item selection states preserved correctly. No blanket select/deselect override on merge.

testCases.title: Cart Merge Selection - Empty + Unselected All (OFF)
testCases.notes: ADMIN-CONFIG REQUIRED: Store setting 'Default selected for checkout' is ON in QA environment. Changing to OFF requires Admin SPA access not available in this test run. Blocked as documented in preconditions.

testCases.title: Cart Merge Selection - Both Selected All (OFF)
testCases.notes: ADMIN-CONFIG REQUIRED: Store setting 'Default selected for checkout' is ON in QA environment. Blocked as documented in preconditions.

testCases.title: Cart Merge Selection - Mixed + Mixed (OFF)
testCases.notes: ADMIN-CONFIG REQUIRED: Store setting 'Default selected for checkout' is ON in QA environment. Blocked as documented in preconditions.

testCases.title: Cart Merge - Configurable Product, Different Options Create Separate Lines
testCases.notes: User cart: Black hat (product/aa8116e5) qty=1. Guest cart: Red hat (product/42ec462f) qty=1. After merge: 2 separate line items - Red hat ($4.00 discounted) and Black hat ($1.60 discounted). Cart header shows 2 Cart. BL-CART-007 confirmed: different configurations of same parent configurable product appear as separate lines. Note: Green hat GUID (59e78525) returned 404 - not in B2B virtual catalog; Red/Black hats used instead of Black/Green as specified.

testCases.title: Cart Merge - Same Configurable Product Same Configuration Sums Quantity
testCases.notes: User cart: Red hat qty=2. Guest cart: Red hat qty=1. After merge: single line item Red hat qty=3 ($12.00 discounted from $15.00). Cart header shows 3 Cart. BL-CART-007 confirmed: identical configuration quantities sum into one line on merge.

testCases.title: Cart Merge - Configurable Product, Different Configs Across User and Guest Carts
testCases.notes: User cart: Black hat (product/aa8116e5) qty=1. Guest cart: Red hat (product/42ec462f) qty=1. After merge: 2 separate lines - Red hat ($4.00) and Black hat ($1.60). Cart header shows 2 Cart. BL-CART-007 honored: different configurations of same base product remain separate lines after cross-cart merge. Green hat GUID returned 404; Red hat used as optionB instead.

bugs.title: Cart merge does not apply EUR user's default currency after guest-to-user merge
bugs.failedAssertion: [DOM] prices displayed in customer default currency (EUR)
bugs.stepsToReproduce: 1. Navigate to storefront as guest with USD currency. 2. Add any product to cart (prices shown in USD). 3. Sign in as EUR_USER_EMAIL (larch9900.mango@mail.com, default currency EUR). 4. Navigate to /cart.
bugs.expected: After sign-in, currency header switches to EUR and all prices display in EUR (user's default currency).
bugs.actual: Currency header remains USD after merge. All prices displayed in USD ($124.00). EUR currency context not applied.
